integrations.odoo_source: construction_1c_integration (controllers: export_to_1c, import_from_1c, sync_partners, sync_documents, sync_nomenclature, get_changes); construction_finance; cron: outbox (5 min)
integrations.odoo_type: HTTP API (bidirectional push/pull via CommerceML XML); file-based exchange
integrations.next_source: modules/integration: OneCController (6 endpoints), OneCIntegrationService (325 lines), OneCConfig/OneCExchangeLog/OneCMapping domains, V73 migration
integrations.next_type: REST API (bidirectional sync via Spring @Transactional); entity mapping table
integrations.gap: Odoo has CommerceML 2.10 XML protocol, file exchange, outbox cron (5 min). Next uses REST JSON API. No @Retryable, no idempotency keys. Missing: CommerceML XML compat, file exchange, outbox cron.

integrations.odoo_source: construction_edi_sbis (sbis_api_client.py); construction_edo_generator; construction_finance/edo_providers.py (Diadoc/SBIS/Kontur); crons: SBIS inbox (15 min), SBIS status (10 min)
integrations.odoo_type: HTTP API to SBIS/Diadoc/Kontur; scheduled inbox/status polling; UPD/invoice/act/torg-12
integrations.next_source: modules/integration: EdoController (6 endpoints), EdoIntegrationService (138 lines, externalId), SbisService (288 lines), SbisConfig/SbisDocument/SbisPartnerMapping, V73 migration
integrations.next_type: REST API with SBIS/Diadoc/Kontur abstraction; document lifecycle with signing/rejection; partner mapping
integrations.gap: No scheduled polling cron for inbox/status in Next. No @Retryable on SbisService. Missing: inbox/status polling crons, exchange journal, retry logic.

integrations.integration_name: Bank API (Sberbank, Tinkoff, VTB, Alfa, Tochka)
integrations.odoo_source: construction_finance: tochka/tinkoff/sberbank/vtb/alfa API clients; crons: Sync Statements (1h), SBP Payments (1h), SBP Notify (6h), Payment status (1h)
integrations.odoo_type: Multi-bank HTTP API; OAuth2/certificate/basic auth; SBP support; scheduled sync
integrations.next_source: modules/integration: BankController (4 endpoints), BankIntegrationService (70 lines), IntegrationEndpoint with SBERBANK/TINKOFF/VTB/ALFA_BANK/RAIFFEISEN providers
integrations.next_type: REST API with multi-bank provider config; payment order creation and reconciliation
integrations.gap: Odoo has 5 bank-specific clients, SBP support, 4 scheduled crons. Next has generic 70-line service, no bank-specific logic, no scheduled sync, no SBP, no retry, no tests.

integrations.odoo_source: Mail module: Email Queue Manager (1h), Fetchmail (5 min disabled), Post scheduled (1d), Digest Emails (1d); omnichannel email channel
integrations.odoo_type: SMTP outbound + IMAP/POP3 inbound; email queue with priority; digest scheduling
integrations.next_source: infrastructure/email: EmailConfig, EmailService; settings: EmailTemplateController (8 endpoints); NotificationService EMAIL type
integrations.next_type: Spring JavaMailSender SMTP outbound; template-based emails; notification preferences
integrations.gap: Odoo has bidirectional email (SMTP+IMAP), queue cron, digests. Next has SMTP outbound only. Missing: fetchmail, email queue, digest scheduling, bounce handling.

integrations.odoo_source: construction_integration/omnichannel.py (Bot API: send, receive webhook, inline keyboards); construction_support (on-call alerts); construction_rbac (user field)
integrations.odoo_type: Telegram Bot API via HTTP; webhook-based receive; on-call notification channel
integrations.next_source: settings/NotificationType.TELEGRAM enum; NotificationSetting preferences; no TelegramService, no bot logic
integrations.next_type: Notification preference enum only; no actual Telegram implementation
integrations.gap: Odoo has full Telegram Bot API: send/receive/inline keyboards/on-call alerts. Next only has TELEGRAM enum, no implementation.

integrations.odoo_source: construction_api/webhook.py (outgoing HMAC-SHA256); construction_finance (payment webhook); cron: outbox (5 min)
integrations.odoo_type: Outgoing webhook with HMAC; outbox pattern; incoming payment callbacks
integrations.next_source: modules/integration: WebhookController (7 endpoints), WebhookReceiver (1 endpoint), IntegrationWebhookService (234 lines, retry), WebhookDeliveryStatus lifecycle
integrations.next_type: Full webhook management: outgoing delivery tracking + retry; incoming code-based routing; delivery lifecycle
integrations.gap: Next has more structured system with delivery tracking and retry. Minor: no confirmed HMAC-SHA256 verification; no outbox cron.

integrations.odoo_source: construction_api: 56+ endpoints (v1/v2); Swagger spec; API key auth; rate-limit cron; idempotency keys
integrations.odoo_type: Versioned REST JSON API (v1, v2); Swagger; API key auth; rate limiting; idempotency
integrations.next_source: 1364 endpoints / 177 controllers; Spring Security role-based auth; IntegrationEndpoint/ConfigController
integrations.next_type: Spring REST with role-based auth; no separate versioned external API
integrations.gap: Odoo has dedicated external API with versioning, Swagger, API key auth, rate limiting, idempotency. Next lacks: versioning, Swagger auto-gen, rate limiting, idempotency keys.

integrations.odoo_source: construction_bim/renga_integration.py (HTTP GET/POST to Renga server); BIM viewer controller
integrations.odoo_type: HTTP API to Renga BIM server; 3D model import/export
integrations.next_source: BIM module with CRUD; no external Renga API integration
integrations.next_type: CRUD only; no external Renga API
integrations.gap: Odoo has direct HTTP integration with Renga BIM server. Next has BIM CRUD but no external API.

integrations.odoo_type: HTTP API to FNS (tax/counterparty), Rosreestr (property/EGRN), EGRUL (company auto-fill)
integrations.next_source: No government registry module or service
integrations.gap: Odoo has FNS, Rosreestr, EGRUL integrations. Next has none.

integrations.odoo_source: construction_ai_assistant/ai_service.py (HTTP POST to LLM); JSON-RPC: chat, analyze, suggest_tasks
integrations.odoo_type: HTTP POST to LLM API; chat, analysis, task suggestion
integrations.gap: Odoo has broader AI: chat, analysis, task suggestions. Next has document analysis only. Missing: chat assistant, task suggestion.

integrations.odoo_type: Multi-channel: SMS gateway, WhatsApp Business API, Viber, email aggregation
integrations.next_source: notification module: WebSocket push, IN_APP, PUSH types; no SMS/WhatsApp/Viber
integrations.next_type: In-app and WebSocket push; batch support; no external messaging
integrations.gap: Odoo has SMS, WhatsApp Business API, Viber. Next has in-app/WebSocket/push only, no SMS/WhatsApp/Viber.

integrations.odoo_type: WebDAV protocol; Synology FileStation REST API
integrations.next_source: CDE module with document containers; no WebDAV/Synology client
integrations.gap: Odoo integrates with WebDAV and Synology NAS. Next uses local/S3 via CDE.

integrations.odoo_type: HTTP GET to external construction pricing database
integrations.next_source: Estimate module with local data; no external pricing API
integrations.gap: Odoo fetches live pricing from FER/TER API. Next uses local data only.

integrations.odoo_source: construction_kep/crypto_service.py (CryptoPro API, commented out); crons: sign reminders (1d), cert expiry (1d)
integrations.odoo_type: CryptoPro API stub; certificate expiry monitoring crons
integrations.next_source: EDO: signDocument/rejectDocument; SignatureStatus enum; no CryptoPro service
integrations.next_type: Signing workflow in EDO; no CryptoPro
integrations.gap: Both lack production CryptoPro. Odoo has stub + cert monitoring crons. Next has signing workflow in EDO but no dedicated crypto service.

integrations.odoo_type: HTTP GET to weather API for daily log entries
integrations.next_source: DailyLog module with DailyLogReminderJob; no weather API
integrations.gap: Odoo fetches weather data for daily log. Next has no weather API integration.

integrations.odoo_type: HTTP health checks to observability stack; Prometheus metrics
integrations.next_type: Spring Boot Actuator; no custom observability stack monitoring
integrations.gap: Odoo has custom ES/Prometheus/Jaeger health checks. Next uses Actuator out-of-box, lacks custom observability monitoring.

integrations.odoo_source: Outbox cron (5 min); idempotency key cleanup (daily); rate-limit cleanup (15 min); module sync models
integrations.odoo_type: Outbox event pattern; idempotency keys; rate limiting with cleanup
integrations.next_source: modules/integration: SyncController (12 endpoints), SyncService (157 lines, retry), SyncMappingService (160 lines), SyncJob/SyncMapping domains
integrations.next_type: Full sync management: job lifecycle (start/cancel/retry), bidirectional mapping, field-level config
integrations.gap: Next has structured sync with job lifecycle and field mapping. Minor: no outbox pattern, no idempotency key management.
